title: Beyond Pills: 3 Non-Pharma Healthcare Stocks for Healthy Gains

title: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on Edwards Lifesciences Corp. and 3M Company
text: TROY, Mich. , Aug. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine today announced Edwards Lifesciences Corp. (NYSE:EW) as its "Stock to Study" and 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) as its "Undervalued Stock" in the November 2023 issue for investors' informational and educational use.

title: Will Edwards Lifesciences Stock Recover To Its Pre-Inflation Shock Highs Of $130?
text: Investors still have concerns about a potential recession despite a steady decline in the inflation rate in response to the Fed's aggressive rate hike plan.

title: EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES TO PRESENT AT THE 2023 WELLS FARGO HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
text: IRVINE, Calif., Aug. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE: EW) today announced it is scheduled to present at the 2023 Wells Fargo Healthcare Conference on Thursday, September 7, 2023.

title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Rides on TAVR Amid Rise in Costs
text: Edwards Lifesciences' (EW) Surgical Structural Heart business growth is driven by increased penetration of its premium RESILIA products across all regions.

title: Edwards Lifesciences: Rising Dominance In Structural Heart Disease
text: Edwards Lifesciences is the global leader in medical devices for structural heart disease and critical care monitoring. Their Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement technology dominates the market and is expected to continue its leading position. EW's growth is driven by the under-penetrated TAVR market and advancements in surgical structural heart and critical care therapies.

title: ITGR vs. EW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Here's Why You Should Invest in Edward Lifesciences (EW) Now

title: 3 MedTech Stocks Likely to Top Estimates This Earnings Season
text: MedTech companies' results are likely to reflect base business recovery on a year-over-year basis. Let's see how EYE, CAH and HSIC are poised ahead of their earnings releases.
